basic_details.job_title: NIT Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Project Associate Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Hamirpur (NIT Hamirpur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Hamirpur (NIT Hamirpur) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Hamirpur has released the official notification for 2 Research Associate and Project Associate-I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Research Associate: Ph.D or equivalent degree in Mechanical Engineering with 3 years of research, teaching, design and development experience after M.E/M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering with at least one SCI journal paper. Project Associate-I: B.E./B.Tech. in Textile/Materials/Mechanical Engineering.
qualification.details: Research Associate: Ph.D or equivalent degree in Mechanical Engineering. 3 years of research, teaching, and design and development experience after M.E/M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering. At least one Research Paper in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal. Project Associate-I: B.E./B.Tech. in the area of Textile/Materials/Mechanical Engineering.

salary_details.pay_scale: Research Associate: Rs. 58,000/-plus HRA. Project Associate-I: Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 30,000 plus HRA (not qualified).
salary_details.details: Research Associate: Rs. 58,000/- plus HRA Project Associate-I: Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 30,000 plus HRA (not qualified)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Hamirpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Hamirpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.national_institute_of_technology_hamirpu: Research Associate: Rs. 58,000/-plus HRA. Project Associate-I: Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 30,000 plus HRA (not qualified).

Research Associate: Ph.D or equivalent degree in Mechanical Engineering with 3 years of research, teaching, design and development experience after M.E/M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering with at least one SCI journal paper. Project Associate-I: B.E./B.Tech. in Textile/Materials/Mechanical Engineering.

content_sections.heading: NIT Hamirpur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Hamirpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Associate: Ph.D or equivalent degree in Mechanical Engineering. 3 years of research, teaching, and design and development experience after M.E/M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering. At least one Research Paper in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal. Project Associate-I: B.E./B.Tech. in the area of Textile/Materials/Mechanical Engineering.

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Research Associate: Rs. 58,000/- plus HRA Project Associate-I: Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA (NET/GATE qualified) or Rs. 30,000 plus HRA (not qualified)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Hamirpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Hamirpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate and Project Associate-I posts is 30th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Associate and Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies, with 1 post for Research Associate and 1 post for Project Associate-I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: For the Project Associate-I position, candidates must have a B.E./B.Tech. degree in Textile, Materials, or Mechanical Engineering.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for a Research Associate at NIT Hamirpur?
faq.answer: The salary for a Research Associate is Rs. 58,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for NIT Hamirpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the designated email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum experience required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: For the Research Associate post, 3 years of research, teaching, and design and development experience after M.E/M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering is required.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Hamirpur located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Hamirpur is located in Hamirpur, Himachal Pradesh, with the pincode 177005.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of NIT Hamirpur?
faq.answer: The official website of National Institute of Technology Hamirpur is nith.ac.in.
